title: Revolt of the Mercenaries
writer: Antonio Boccaci, Piero Costa, Eduardo Falletti
actors: Virginia Mayo, Conrado San Martín, Susana Canales
plot: During the Renaissance, in Friul, Italy. Beautiful Duchess Patrizia is determined to marry, although against her will, effeminate but powerful Prince Stefano. This is the only way she has found to thwart the plans of Count Keller,...
